youtube.message: Your task is done! Stop watching YouTube and come check it out!

twitter.message: Task finished! Get off X, you've got code to review!

reddit.message: Your task is ready! Reddit can wait, your code can't!

facebook.message: Hey! Your task finished! Facebook isn't going anywhere, come back!

instagram.message: Task complete! Stop scrolling Instagram and check your code!

tiktok.message: Your code is done! TikTok can wait!

twitch.message: Task finished! Pause the stream and check your code!

netflix.message: Your task is done! Pause the show and come review it!

hackernews.message: Task done! HN will still be there, go check your code!

linkedin.message: Your task finished! LinkedIn can wait!

slack.message: Task complete! Finish your chat and come check the code!

discord.message: Your task is done! Discord can wait!

telegram.message: Task finished! Check your code when you're done chatting!

whatsapp.message: Your code is ready! Come back when you can!

spotify.message: Task done! Good tunes, but your code needs you!

browserGenericMessage: Your task finished and you haven't come back yet! Come check it out!
defaultMessage: Hey! Your task is done! Come take a look!

messages: One hour in! Stand up, stretch, drink water. Your back will thank you.
60 minutes of coding. Look 20 feet away for 20 seconds. Protect those eyes!
Hey human, you're still carbon-based. Grab some water, stretch, come back.
Hour's up! Roll your shoulders, unclench your jaw, take a breath.
Quick PSA from your spine: please stand up for 2 minutes.
Hydration check! When did you last drink water? Go get some.
Your wrists called. They want a break. Shake 'em out!
60 min flown by! Look at something far away, then come back.
Posture check! Sit up straight, push shoulders back, unclench your jaw.
Take 5. Stretch, breathe, blink. The code will be here when you're back.
